overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring featuring a character in dark robes and a large circular hat exploring a fantasy landscape. The clip opens with a panoramic view from a cliff edge overlooking floating castles and a giant golden tree above a sea of clouds, then transitions to the character walking through ancient overgrown ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with floating structures above clouds

events.description: the giant golden Erdtree comes into view on the left as the character turns
ancient cliffside ruins become visible as the camera continues panning left

agents.ego_description: standing on a mossy stone platform at the cliff edge, slowly rotating to survey the vast landscape of floating castles and cloud-filled valleys

entered.detail: massive gothic castle with multiple spires floating above the sea of clouds
dense white clouds filling the valley below the cliff edge
moss-covered stone platform at the edge of the cliff
tall broken stone pillar standing alone on the cliff
enormous golden-glowing tree visible in the distant haze
ancient stone ruins built into the cliffside with archways

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a cliff edge overlooking a vast sea of clouds with floating castles in the distance. As the camera pans left, the massive golden Erdtree reveals itself, dominating the horizon. Ancient stone ruins cling to the cliffside, and the atmosphere is hazy and ethereal.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruins overgrown with tall grass and forest

events.description: scene cuts to grassy ruins area with game text 'Rauh Ancient Ruins' appearing at bottom left
character emerges from under the stone arch into brighter dappled sunlight of the forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass under ancient stone archway toward the distant Erdtree

entered.detail: massive ancient stone archway covered in vines and vegetation
dense tall green grass covering the ground throughout the area
crumbling stone walls overgrown with moss and bushes
tall trees with dense canopy surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the Rauh Ancient Ruins, passing under a massive stone archway covered in vegetation. Tall grass sways as the character moves through the overgrown path, with the golden Erdtree visible in the distance through the arch. The environment transitions from shadowed ruins to a brighter forest clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a panoramic cliffside vista into the depths of overgrown ancient ruins. It begins with a wide view of a character overlooking a vast sea of clouds and floating castles, panning left to reveal the massive, glowing Erdtree dominating a hazy, ethereal horizon. As the perspective shifts, the camera follows the character away from the cliff's edge and through a massive stone archway draped in vegetation. The scene then moves from the shadowed ruins into a brighter forest clearing, where tall grass sways along an overgrown path while the golden tree remains a distant beacon through the stone architecture.
